acceptance_targets: [CH07-BOOKER-001] PASS if revised lines anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:313-343 leave Marisol with no confirmed paid re-entry slot and at least one explicit unresolved external condition; FAIL if she exits with immediate program re-entry already available.

[CH07-CRAFT-001] PASS if revised lines around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:311-337 include direct dialogue from at least one affected youth/guardian plus one specific practical consequence; FAIL if all youth impact remains second-hand via staff narration.

[CH07-CRAFT-002] PASS if revised material between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:257-275 contains at least one full paragraph of unresolved, embodied social discomfort directly caused by her admission; FAIL if the chapter still pivots to logistics without additional friction.

[FBR-C01-009] Pass if the throat-closure dry-heave moment remains intact at the target line and nearby lines increase its unique physical specificity; fail if this anchor is removed or blurred into generic discomfort phrasing.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised lines anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:313-343 leave Marisol with no confirmed paid re-entry slot and at least one explicit unresolved external condition; FAIL if she exits with immediate program re-entry already available.
findings.problem: The chapter restores external footing too quickly after the no-show damage: Marisol loses the Tuesday section, but receives a same-call path back (Saturday substitute slot), then exits on qualified relief. This compresses consequence and reduces forward jeopardy.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the accountability call and aftermath at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:313, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:325, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:337, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:341 so no same-scene reinstatement path is granted, or attach a concrete probation burden that cannot be resolved in this chapter (for example required observation, delayed review date, or unpaid make-good labor).

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised lines around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:311-337 include direct dialogue from at least one affected youth/guardian plus one specific practical consequence; FAIL if all youth impact remains second-hand via staff narration.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift: the chapter reports harm to the youths she failed through staff summaries and Marisol's imagination, but avoids direct on-page contact with an affected student or guardian. Summary replaces scene at the core moral consequence.
findings.rewrite_direction: Insert a direct accountability exchange in the existing consequence block around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:311 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:335 where Marisol hears from at least one named affected person (student or guardian) and responds without self-mythologizing. Keep the harm concrete (missed feedback, broken trust, or canceled deliverable) rather than administrative abstraction.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised material between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:257-275 contains at least one full paragraph of unresolved, embodied social discomfort directly caused by her admission; FAIL if the chapter still pivots to logistics without additional friction.
findings.problem: Timidity after the public confession: the prose moves rapidly from admission to supportive reset and logistics, with limited dwell time in immediate social discomfort. The scene pulls back from the full emotional/physical reality it sets up.
findings.rewrite_direction: Expand the post-confession beat between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:257 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:275 to include one sustained uncomfortable interaction before transitioning to planning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:279.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the throat-closure dry-heave moment remains intact at the target line and nearby lines increase its unique physical specificity; fail if this anchor is removed or blurred into generic discomfort phrasing.
findings.problem: Recurring full-book somatic pattern: 'throat tightened/closed' appears in 4 chapters (chapter_02, chapter_07, chapter_08, chapter_12). This chapter contains the strongest, most embodied relapse-aftermath use and should KEEP as one retained anchor instance.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep the core moment at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2063-2064, but sharpen adjacent specificity in snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2059-2066 (dehydration/retching/body instability details) so this remains the canonical instance while other chapters diversify.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When choosing between reputationally safe abstraction and specific discomfort, choose specificity. Render addiction, sexuality, deceit, class shame, and grief at lived scale. In edge cases, preserve character truth and causal accountability over reader comfort or institutional decorum.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene demands bodily, moral, or economic specificity, euphemistic phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with concrete stakes and observable consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; full forms appear only for emphasis, ritual language, or character-specific formal posture

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density and pressure modes: pair high-conflict chapters with quiet domestic or documentary chapters, vary dialogue-to-interiority ratios, and prevent identical chapter skeletons in consecutive sequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: contemporary literary diction with class-aware, borough-specific concreteness; avoid prestige-neutral workshop language
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Marisol, with rare brief distance expansions for institutional scenes
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternating tensile compression and reflective extension; line-level cadence should carry emotional pressure, not just information
